title: Spck Alternative — Acode Android IDE with Terminal | Acode
description: Looking beyond Spck Editor? Acode adds a full Linux terminal, AI coding agents, SSH, FTP, and 250+ plugins. The Android IDE that lets you edit AND run code in one app.
heroHeadline: Spck Lets You Edit Code. Acode Lets You Run It.
heroSubheadline: Spck is a good code editor for Android. Acode is a complete IDE — same code editing capabilities plus a full Alpine Linux terminal, AI coding agents, 250+ plugins, SSH, and FTP.
problemHeadline: Spck Can Edit Code, But It Can't Run It
problemPoints: Spck Editor is a popular Android code editor with good Git integration and a clean UI. It's great for editing code — but it stops there. You can't run Node.js, can't install npm packages, can't execute Python scripts.
Without a terminal, Spck is an editor, not a development environment. You can write code but never see it run. You can import libraries but never install them.
solutionPoints: Acode gives you everything Spck offers — syntax highlighting, Git integration, clean UI, project management — plus a full Alpine Linux terminal. Install Node.js, Python, Git, compilers. Run your code. See the output.
Acode has 250+ plugins (vs Spck's limited ecosystem). AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode) run natively. SSH and FTP clients built in. It's not a code editor — it's a complete IDE.

features.title: Run What You Write
features.description: Spck lets you edit JavaScript. Acode lets you run it. Install Node.js, npm, Python — execute your code in the terminal and see the output instantly.

features.title: AI Coding on Mobile
features.description: Spck has no AI features. Acode runs Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode natively. AI agents generate code in the terminal, you edit it in the editor.

features.title: 250+ Plugins
features.description: Spck has limited extensibility. Acode has a thriving plugin ecosystem with themes, language servers, AI tools, formatters, and more.
